_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic imbalance of HMMR/RHAMM regulates the sensitivity and response of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumour cells to aurora kinase inhibition.

_contextSnippet: the reduced expression of TPX2 did not alter the IC-50 for MLN8237 or VX680
details: TPX2 silencing did not alter IC-50 for MLN8237 or VX680, but may have impacted sphere self-renewal capacity with significant reduction in second passage sphere formation
